str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - learn-to-code
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: How to Learn Coding Without Feeling Overwhelmed
entry.summary: Embark on your coding journey without feeling overwhelmed. From setting clear goals to celebrating victories, this guide offers practical steps for a positive and steady learning experience.

entry.title: How to Learn to Code by Building Your Own Website
entry.summary: Unlock the world of coding by building your website! This comprehensive guide navigates the journey, from HTML basics to dynamic features, creating a practical coding experience.

entry.title: How to Learn to Code by Starting Your Own Tech Blog
entry.summary: Unlock the power of learning to code by creating your own tech blog! Explore 15 compelling reasons, from building a portfolio to networking opportunities. Ready to share your coding journey with the world? Read more now!

entry.title: How to Learn to Code Without Relying on Tutorials
entry.summary: Learn to code without relying on tutorials! Explore 15 effective strategies, from mastering basics to contributing to open source. Build a strong foundation, engage with coding communities, and embrace real-world projects. Elevate your skills and become a proficient coder!

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Not Being Able to Code from Scratch
entry.summary: Discover how to overcome the fear of coding from scratch with practical tips and strategies. From mastering the basics to embracing challenges, this guide empowers aspiring programmers. Learn, practice, and celebrate milestones on your coding journey. Share the wisdom and support others in their quest for coding success.
